case_title: CAROLYN ALEXANDER VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANOTHER PLANET ENTERTAINMENT, LLC
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-26-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, OR DISMISS DEFENDANT(S) S.F. BILL GRAHAM CIVIC AUDITORIUM. THE JAN-02-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ARNOLD I. WEBER.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE LAW OFFICES OF ARNOLD LAUB'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF CAROLYN ALEXANDER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PROOF OF SERVICE STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS SERVED BY MAIL ON JANUARY 6, 2014. THE LAST DAY FOR TIMELY SERVICE WAS JANUARY 4, 2014. (SEE CCP SEC. 1005(B), "'IF THE NOTICE IS SERVED BY MAIL, THE REQUIRED 16-DAY PERIOD OF NOTICE BEFORE THE HEARING SHALL BE INCREASED BY FIVE CALENDAR DAYS IF THE PLACE OF MAILING AND THE PLACE OF ADDRESS ARE WITHIN THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA."). JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CAROLYN ALEXANDER, PLAINTIFF; No other appearances.

RULING: Matter discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Roger L. Sisneros, Esq.'s motion to be relieved as counsel of record for plaintiff Carolyn Alexander is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
THE LAW OFFICES OF ARNOLD LAUB'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF CAROLYN ALEXANDER IS Off calendar. The proof of service states that the motion was served by mail on January 6, 2014. The last day for timely service was January 4, 2014. (See CCP sec. 1005(b), "'if the notice is served by mail, the required 16-day period of notice before the hearing shall be increased by five calendar days if the place of mailing and the place of address are within the State of California."). Judge: A. James Robertson, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
